tldr.title: Seed briefing — run the pipeline to replace me
tldr.author: techpulse-bot
bullets: This seed JSON ships with the repo so Netlify has something to render before the first pipeline run.
On the first GitHub Actions run (manual or scheduled), this file is overwritten with real briefings.
Each TL;DR card pairs the most-engaged story per category with three Gemini-generated bullet points.

discussions.title: Seed feed row — replaced on first pipeline run
discussions.author: techpulse-bot
